items.headline: American Water Works Funds 8% Dividend Hike Through State-Regulated Rate Increases This Year
items.summary: American Water Works (NYSE:AWK) just raised its quarterly dividend by 8% to $0.895 per share, the latest step in a decade of uninterrupted increases at the country’s largest publicly traded regulated water utility.
